what_it_does: Renders a static design-system preview card showing an 8-px-based spacing scale with named spacing tokens, gold horizontal bars, and pixel values.
observations: Includes a @dsCard metadata comment naming the card "Spacing scale" with Brand grouping, subtitle, and 700x280 viewport.
Loads shared styling from _card.css and adds file-local CSS for the card layout, text, rows, and bars.
States that component padding is usually 16-24px and gutters between sections are 32-48px.
Displays 11 spacing steps from --s-1 at 4px through --s-24 at 96px.
Each row uses a token-like name, an inline-width gold bar, and a right-aligned monospace pixel value.
standouts: The scale is expressed visually and numerically in the same card.
Token names follow multiplier-style labels while pixel values show the rendered size.
The preview uses accent gold as the visual measure color.
conventions: Uses a self-contained HTML preview card pattern with shared _card.css plus inline page-specific CSS.
Uses CSS custom-property references for typography and colors.
Uses compact grid rows with fixed label and value columns around a flexible bar area.
Keeps the spacing values directly in HTML via inline width styles and text labels.
concerns: Spacing values are duplicated between inline bar widths and pixel labels, so manual edits could desynchronize them.
The token values are presented as static markup rather than generated from a single data source.
notes: This file is a static spacing-token reference card for the ConceptV design system preview set.
questions: Are the --s-* labels intended to map directly to real CSS custom properties defined elsewhere?
Should the 4px --s-1 value be treated as part of the 8-px grid or as a half-step exception?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the actual content: it presents an 8-px base spacing scale with 11 visualized steps.
intention_signals: It seems intended to make spacing tokens easy to scan during design-system handoff by pairing names, pixel values, and proportional bars.
novelty: The card combines token labels, exact pixel labels, and proportional inline bars in a compact ledger-like preview.
contribution: Contributes a concrete spacing vocabulary, common padding and gutter ranges, and a visual token scale that a fused system would keep as spacing guidance.
summary_for_embedding: Static HTML design-system preview card documenting an 11-step ConceptV spacing scale with token names, pixel values, and proportional gold bars.
intention_for_embedding: Created to communicate the intended spacing rhythm and common layout intervals for design-system implementation or handoff.
